infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MeraTax uses the camera so you can photograph receipts to attach to expense records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MeraTax needs access to your photo library so you can attach receipt images to expense records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: MeraTax saves downloaded return templates to your photo library for offline access.

plugins.photosPermission: MeraTax needs access to your photo library so you can attach receipt images to expense records.
plugins.cameraPermission: MeraTax needs access to your camera so you can photograph receipts for expense records.
